parameters.query:
-- ============================================================
-- msq_dispatch_orders — Terminal Africa dispatch order history
-- ============================================================
-- Depends on: msq_tenants (id uuid PK)
-- Run AFTER msq_tenants has been created.
-- ============================================================

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS msq_dispatch_orders (
    id                UUID        PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id         UUID        NOT NULL
                                  REFERENCES msq_tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    -- Terminal Africa references
    shipment_id       TEXT        NOT NULL,           -- SH-XXXXXXX
    carrier_name      TEXT,                           -- e.g. DHL, Sendbox, Gokada
    -- Pricing
    amount            NUMERIC(12,2),                  -- delivery cost
    -- Status tracking
    status            TEXT        NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',     -- draft | confirmed | in_transit | delivered | cancelled
    payment_status    TEXT        NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',   -- pending | paid | cod
    payment_method    TEXT,       -- speedy | cod
    -- Tracking
    tracking_number   TEXT,
    tracking_url      TEXT,
    -- Address snapshots (jsonb so we keep a local record even if Terminal changes)
    pickup_address    JSONB,      -- { first_name, last_name, phone, email, line1, city, state, country, zip }
    delivery_address  JSONB,      -- same shape
    -- Parcel snapshot
    parcel_info       JSONB,      -- { item_name, description, weight_kg, quantity, value, currency }
    -- Timestamps
    created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at        TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

-- ============================================================
-- Indexes
-- ============================================================

-- Fast lookup by tenant (list my orders)
CREATE INDEX idx_dispatch_tenant
    ON msq_dispatch_orders (tenant_id);

-- Fast lookup by Terminal shipment ID (tracking, confirm, webhook)
CREATE INDEX idx_dispatch_shipment
    ON msq_dispatch_orders (shipment_id);

-- Status queries (all in-transit, all pending payment, etc.)
CREATE INDEX idx_dispatch_status
    ON msq_dispatch_orders (status);

-- Recent orders per tenant (sorted by newest first)
CREATE INDEX idx_dispatch_tenant_created
    ON msq_dispatch_orders (tenant_id, created_at DESC);

-- ============================================================
-- Auto-update table_1 on row change
-- ============================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_dispatch_orders_updated_at()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    NEW.updated_at = now();
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE TRIGGER trg_dispatch_orders_updated_at
    BEFORE UPDATE table_2 msq_dispatch_orders
    FOR EACH ROW
    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_dispatch_orders_updated_at();

parameters.content:
## Tool 3 — Track Dispatch

1. IF shipment_id → GET live status + DB lookup
2. IF no shipment_id → List recent from table_3
3. Sync status back to DB
4. Return tracking events or order list

## Tool 2 — Confirm Dispatch Order

1. Lookup Order from table_3
2. IF speedy → Call Speedy → Check result
3. IF COD or Speedy OK → Arrange Pickup
4. Update Order → confirmed + tracking
5. Return confirmation details

## Tool 1 — Get Dispatch Quotes

1. Create Pickup Address — POST /addresses
2. Create Delivery Address — POST /addresses (parallel)
3. Create Parcel — POST /parcels
4. Create Shipment — POST /shipments (draft)
5. Get Rates — GET /rates/shipment
6. Save Draft Order — INSERT msq_dispatch_orders
7. Return — shipment_id, order_id, rates[]

value.pickup_address: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.sender_name, phone: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.sender_phone, address: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.sender_address, city: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.sender_city, state: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.sender_state, country: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.sender_country }) }}
value.delivery_address: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.recipient_name, phone: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.recipient_phone, address: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.recipient_address, city: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.recipient_city, state: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.recipient_state, country: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.recipient_country }) }}
value.parcel_info: ={{ JSON.stringify({ item_name: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.item_name, description: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.item_description, weight_kg: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.item_weight_kg, order_number: $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.order_number || null}) }}

SELECT *
FROM table_4
column_1 $1
  column_2 $2::uuid
LIMIT 1

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{ 'Great news! Your order has been dispatched 🚚' + ($('Finalize Dispatch Confirmation').first().json.tracking_number ? ' Tracking: ' + $('Finalize Dispatch Confirmation').first().json.tracking_number : ' Tracking details will be sent shortly.') }}

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM table_4
column_1 $1
  column_2 $2::uuid
LIMIT 1

SELECT id, shipment_id, carrier_name, status, payment_status,
       payment_method, amount, tracking_number, tracking_url,
       delivery_address, created_at
FROM table_4
column_2 $1::uuid
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH dispatch_update table_6 (
  UPDATE table_4
  column_4 'confirmed',
    payment_status = CASE WHEN $3 = 'cod' THEN 'cod' ELSE 'paid' END,
    payment_method = $3,
    carrier_name = COALESCE(NULLIF($4, ''), carrier_name),
    amount = COALESCE($5::numeric, amount),
    tracking_number = COALESCE(NULLIF($6, ''), tracking_number),
    tracking_url = COALESCE(NULLIF($7, ''), tracking_url),
    updated_at = NOW()
  column_3 $1::uuid
  RETURNING
    id,
    business_id,
    shipment_id,
    parcel_info,
    carrier_name,
    amount,
    tracking_number,
    tracking_url
),
resolved_order AS (
  SELECT
    du.*,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF($2, ''),
      du.parcel_info->>'order_number'
    ) AS order_number
  FROM table_7 du
),
customer_update table_6 (
  UPDATE table_8 co
  column_4 'dispatched',
    dispatch_shipment_id = ro.shipment_id,
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM table_9 ro
  WHERE co.business_id = ro.business_id
    AND co.order_number = ro.order_number
  RETURNING
    co.order_number,
    co.customer_chat_id,
    co.business_id,
    co.dispatch_shipment_id
)
SELECT
  ro.shipment_id,
  ro.order_number,
  ro.carrier_name,
  ro.amount,
  ro.tracking_number,
  ro.tracking_url,
  cu.customer_chat_id,
  pi.access_token AS bot_token,
  CASE WHEN cu.order_number IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS customer_order_updated
FROM table_9 ro
LEFT JOIN table_10 cu ON true
LEFT JOIN table_11 pi
  ON pi.business_id = COALESCE(cu.business_id, ro.business_id)
 AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
LIMIT 1

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Lookup Order').first().json.id, $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.order_number || '', $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.payment_method, $('Arrange Pickup').first().json.data.carrier_name || '', $('Arrange Pickup').first().json.data.amount || $('Incoming Tool Request').first().json.amount || null, $('Arrange Pickup').first().json.data.tracking_number || '', $('Arrange Pickup').first().json.data.tracking_url || '' ] }}
